plang.note: 86 test files (60%) silently skipped by test runner — condition, cache, actor, builder, crypto, event, foreach, goalcall tests never execute

improvements_since_v6.foreach_dict: Fixed — Data.EnumerateItems yields correct key/value pairs, test has value assertions
improvements_since_v6.list_modules: 9 modules rewritten for OBP, coverage: first/get/join/contains=100%, indexof=90%, last=80%

findings.issue: PLang test runner silently skips 86 of 143 test files (60%). Discovers all 143, prints 'Running' for only 57. No error output for skipped tests. All condition (23), cache (4), actor (3), builder (4), crypto (6), event (8), foreach (2), goalcall (8+) tests never execute.
findings.impact: The entire PLang test suite gives a false picture. 86 test files appear to pass because they never run. Condition tests (the key feature of this branch) are 100% untested at the PLang level.
findings.suggestion: Debug the test runner foreach loop. The pattern is: Tests/X/File.test.goal runs, Tests/X/Y/File.test.goal sometimes doesn't. Possibly related to file.list returning Data objects that foreach doesn't fully iterate. Try running a single deep test manually: plang --test '--test={"path":"Tests/Condition/Basic"}'

findings.issue: 138 lines of LLM response validation at 0% coverage — unchanged from v6
findings.suggestion: Write C# tests for JSON parsing, step count validation, index checks

findings.issue: Rewritten for OBP (simpler now) but still 0% coverage (24 lines)
findings.suggestion: Test with matching/non-matching conditions, empty lists, dict items

findings.issue: Rewritten for OBP but still 0% coverage (44 lines)
findings.suggestion: Test with multiple groups, missing key, empty list

findings.issue: Query_OnValidateResponse_MaxRetries_ReturnsError still fails: gets 'File not found: .build/alwaysfails.pr' instead of 'Validation failed after 3 retries'
findings.impact: Retry counting logic untested — same as v6 finding #7
findings.suggestion: Set up a real .pr file for AlwaysFails goal or mock goal resolution

findings.issue: Query_ToolCall_LlmRequestsToolAndHandlesError still fails with empty string assertion
findings.impact: Tool call error handling path untested — same as v6 finding #8

findings.issue: Timer module still 0% (20 lines) — unchanged from v6
cache.store still 0% (44 lines) — unchanged from v6

findings.impact: Reserved keyword changes could break variable validation

findings.issue: Data.Compare weak edges unchanged — no boolean mismatch, no type-kind mismatch, no nested diff structure test
findings.impact: Boolean comparison could be flipped, nested diffs corrupted

findings.issue: Data.ToBoolean numeric paths (double/float/decimal/short/byte at lines 419-424) still at 0%. Only bool/string/int paths tested via IfHandlerTests.
findings.impact: Numeric truthiness for non-int types could be wrong
Low — UI inherently hard to test

findings.issue: IBuildValidatable.ValidateBuild still untested — unchanged from v6

plang_test_failures.error: Setup assertion: Expected True, Actual null
Expected 4 items after add, Actual null
ServiceError: Object must be of type String (assert greater-than type mismatch)

summary: Significant improvement from v6. C# tests: 2069/2071 pass (was 2065/2069). Foreach dict bug fixed with proper value assertions. Condition orchestration coverage jumped from ~0% to 92.9%. List modules rewritten for OBP with good coverage. However: (1) CRITICAL: PLang test runner silently skips 60% of tests — 86 of 143 test files (including ALL condition tests) never execute; (2) validateResponse.cs still 0%; (3) list.any/group still 0%; (4) 2 broken LLM tests persist; (5) 9 PLang test assertion failures. Recommend fixing test runner first, then remaining coverage gaps.
